# Chijun Sima

> Senior Software Development Engineer at Tencent (WeChat). ML systems researcher focused on efficient AI: scalable training/serving, system–algorithm co-design, model freshness, recommender systems, LLM serving. Co-first author of Ekko (OSDI 2022). LLVM developer with commit access.

- Website: https://www.chijunsima.com
- Email: simachijun@gmail.com
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8-HD_IEAAAAJ&hl=en
- GitHub: https://github.com/NutshellySima
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chijun-sima/
- CV (PDF): https://www.chijunsima.com/cv.pdf
- Full LLM context: https://www.chijunsima.com/llms-full.txt

## Flagship work

**Ekko** (OSDI '22): low-latency model update system for multi-terabyte deep learning recommendation models. WAN bandwidth −92%, machine cost −49%, 2.4s update latency, 10,000× model-size scaling. Deployed in WeChat recommendation serving 1B+ users daily.

Paper: https://www.usenix.org/conference/osdi22/presentation/sima

## Research areas

Efficient AI (MLSys), model freshness, recommender systems, LLM serving, KV-cache management, distributed systems, compilers (LLVM)
